Name: Fetal Tissue Annotation Challenge (FeTA) Dataset - Biometric measurements
Authors: Thomas Sanchez, Yvan Gomez, Meriam Koob, Andras Jakab, Meritxell Bach Cuadra
Acknowledgements: Special thanks to the annotators who carried out the biometric measurements, Yvan Gomez, Andras Jakab and Meriam Koob.
HowToAcknowledge: Please cite our Zenodo dataset: Sanchez et al. (2024) Fetal Tissue Annotation Challenge (FeTA) Biometry - MICCAI 2024.  https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.11192452
Funding: University Research Priority Program “Adaptive Brain Circuits in Development and Learning (AdaBD)
EthicsApprovals: The ethics committees of Zürich (Decision numbers: 2017-00885, 2016-01019, 2017-00167) agreed to the protocols of the retrospective studies.
